title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program Amounting to Six Million Two Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 6,200.000.00) for the Office of the Municipal Mayor Under Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses for Subsidy to Local Government Units in Particular to Barangay Bagong Silang Chargeable Against Government Equity Surplus. Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 02/06/2023
